title: Ironstrider
specialty: Rapid-strike walker cavalry · precision fire support
lore: The Ironstrider Ballistarius and Sydonian Dragoon are two variants of the Ironstrider chassis — tall, bipedal walker platforms piloted by a single Skitarii warrior who is neurally bonded to the machine through a cranial interface.

The neural link between pilot and Ironstrider is so deep that the walker effectively becomes an extension of the rider's body. Over time, pilot and machine become interdependent — the Skitarii cannot function without the Ironstrider's sensory feeds, and the walker's systems are calibrated to the pilot's neural rhythms alone.

Ironstriders move with a distinctive swaying gait that covers ground with surprising speed. Ballistarius variants carry twin cognis autocannon or twin cognis lascannon for long-range fire; Dragoons carry taser lances for devastating close-combat charges.
